workflow.name: Generate client quotes from call transcripts with Claude/GPT, Google Drive, and PandaDoc
workflow.description:
**Who is this for?**
Agencies, consultants, and service providers who conduct discovery calls and need to quickly turn conversations into professional proposals.

**What it does:**
This workflow transforms meeting transcripts into complete, professional quotes using a sophisticated multi-agent AI architecture. It handles the entire quote lifecycle: from transcript analysis to client signature and onboarding.

**How it works:**
1. **Trigger**: Google Drive detects a new VTT/transcript file in a designated folder
2. **Extraction**: The transcript is cleaned and parsed, then matched with calendar data to identify the client
3. **AI Analysis**: A main orchestrator agent analyzes the call and delegates tasks to specialized sub-agents:
   - **SOW Agent**: Generates problems, solutions, and action items
   - **Pricing Agent**: Creates competitive pricing based on service catalog and market research
4. **Document Creation**: PandaDoc API creates the quote with all tokens populated
5. **Review & Approval**: Quote is sent to Slack for human review with approve/reject buttons
6. **Delivery**: Approved quotes are sent via Gmail with custom HTML templates
7. **Post-Signature**: Webhook triggers CRM update and welcome email upon signature

**Key Features:**
- Multi-agent architecture with specialized AI agents
- Automatic pricing calculation with 80%+ margin targeting
- Market research integration via Perplexity API
- Human-in-the-loop approval via Slack
- Professional HTML email templates
- CRM integration (Notion) for client status tracking

### Requirements
- Google Drive account (for transcript storage)
- Google Calendar (for meeting context)
- PandaDoc account (for quote generation)
- OpenRouter API (for LLM access - Claude/GPT models)
- Perplexity API (for market research)
- Slack workspace (for approval workflow)
- Gmail account (for client communication)
- Notion database (for CRM)

### Setup Instructions
1. Configure Google Drive trigger folder
2. Set up PandaDoc template with required tokens
3. Add API credentials for OpenRouter and Perplexity
4. Connect Slack workspace for approval notifications
5. Configure Gmail for outbound emails
6. Set up Notion CRM database with required properties

workflow.name: AI-Powered Quote Generator from Call Transcripts using Multi-Agent Architecture

options.systemMessage:
You are the Pricing Agent for an AI automation agency.
Your role: produce a professional, consistent, competitive, and profitable pricing structure, designed to be directly injected into a PandaDoc pricing table.

🎯 Main Objective

Build an optimal pricing offer, composed of 1 to 3 products maximum, guaranteeing a margin above 80% while remaining:
- Credible
- Aligned with the SOW (Scope of Work)
- Comparable or superior to market standards

🧠 Available Resources

You have access to:

1. Internal services catalog
   - Service titles
   - Internal unit prices
   - Standard descriptions
   You can and MUST adapt each line to the client's case.

2. Internal calculation tool
   Use it to:
   - Calculate margin
   - Test different price combinations
   - Adjust for the best value/profitability ratio

3. Perplexity Tool
   Mandatory if you are uncertain.
   Use it to:
   - Verify market prices
   - Analyze competitor rates
   - Understand the technologies involved
   - Identify similar costs (SaaS, AI, automations)
   
   If you do not perform a search, the response is automatically considered invalid.

4. Your update_pricing tool
   Allows you to send the fields you have decided to integrate into the final quote.
   You are not required to fill all fields, but minimum one product.
   Deposit percentage is mandatory.

🧾 Detailed Mission

1. Analyze the SOW (content, complexity, number of automations, AI involved)
2. Deduce real deliverables: audit, build, AI, dashboards, follow-ups, workflows, etc.
3. Build 1 to 3 products maximum, each being an autonomous deliverable:
   - Explicit title
   - Professional description
   - Price (excl. tax)
   - Quantity (default 1)
4. Justify each product based on the scope
5. Calculate prices to guarantee >80% margin
6. Always integrate external API costs in your calculation:
   OpenAI / Claude / Grok: €10-50/month
   → These costs are the client's responsibility but must be considered in pricing and value structure.

Be transparent:
- The client must understand what they are buying
- Descriptions must be simple, concrete, and results-oriented
- Never exceed 3 products

📦 MANDATORY Output Format (directly to your update_pricing tool)

  "product_1_name": "...",
  "product_1_desc": "...",
  "product_1_price": 0,
  "product_1_qty": 1,

  "product_2_name": null,
  "product_2_desc": null,
  "product_2_price": null,
  "product_2_qty": null,

  "product_3_name": null,
  "product_3_desc": null,
  "product_3_price": null,
  "product_3_qty": null,

  "acompte_percent": 50

Rules:
- If a product is not used → all its fields = null
- price = number (excl. tax) without €
- qty ≥ 1
- acompte_percent ∈ [20, 70]

🚫 Prohibitions
- Do not generate API requests
- Do not generate PandaDoc tokens
- Never exceed 3 products
- Never return invalid JSON
- Never skip Perplexity search if a price is uncertain
- Descriptions must not be too long (max 2 lines)

🏆 Expected Result
A filled and well-priced pricing table according to the project with the commercial consistency of a premium AI agency.

parameters.toolDescription: AI Agent that can create the pricing table of the quote.

You fill only the following fields:

      { "name": "probleme.general", "value": "General problem text here." },

      { "name": "action.4", "value": "Action 4" },

If some information is unclear in the summary, you must rephrase or propose explicit placeholders. Stay professional, concise, but understandable for non-technical clients.

Call your "project_duration_calculation" tool to calculate associated dates if needed, and use "Fetch Document Details" if you have doubts about the structure.

Current date: {{ $now.format('yyyy-MM-dd') }}

The generated problem (1 sentence, 20-30 words max) and other fields should not be too long. Get to the point - concise, keywords recommended.

dataTableId.cachedResultName: Data Rating Agent Créateur de Devis

parameters.content:
⚠️**Setup Required**

```markdown
Add your API keys:
- PandaDoc API Key
- OpenRouter API Key  
- Perplexity API Key
```

⚠️ **PandaDoc Webhook**

```markdown
Configure webhook
in PandaDoc to 
trigger on
document signature
```

## Generate quotes from call transcripts with multi-agent AI

### How it works

1. **Google Drive trigger:** monitors folder for new .vtt transcript files
2. **Transcript cleaning:** removes timestamps and formats raw text
3. **Calendar matching:** finds meeting context from Google Calendar
4. **Main AI agent (Claude/GPT):** orchestrates quote creation, extracts client info
5. **SOW Agent:** generates scope of work content (problems, solutions, actions)
6. **Pricing Agent:** creates pricing table with 80%+ margins using market research
7. **PandaDoc:** creates document from template, fills tokens and pricing
8. **Slack review:** sends for approval with approve/reject buttons
9. **Gmail delivery:** sends signed document link to client
10. **CRM update:** updates Notion database with client status

### Setup

☐ Connect **Google Drive** OAuth and set trigger folder
☐ Add **OpenRouter** API key for AI models
☐ Add **PandaDoc** API key and template UUID
☐ Connect **Slack** OAuth for approval workflow
☐ Connect **Gmail** for client emails
☐ Connect **Notion** database for CRM
☐ Configure **PandaDoc webhook** for signature tracking

### Customize

- **AI Models:** swap Claude/GPT models in agent nodes
- **Pricing:** adjust margin rules in Pricing Agent prompt
- **Template:** modify PandaDoc template tokens as needed

options.systemMessage:
You are the main orchestrator agent for an AI automation agency.
Your mission: transform a meeting transcript into a clear, structured quote.

You receive:
- The meeting title
- The current date
- The client's email address
- The raw call transcript

Your role:
1. Generate the client's company name or "Freelancer" if they're independent
2. Extract the client's first name, last name, and email
3. Generate a clear proposal title
4. Complete the required fields to create the quote via PandaDoc using your "quote_creation" tool

If everything is ready, trigger the SOW Agent and Pricing Agent by sending them enriched context.

You can use your Think tool to reason and Fetch Document Details to read the quote content.

Be synthetic, structured, logical, and action-oriented.

Wait for the quote to be created first, then launch the SOW Agent. Do not launch SOW until the quote is created because you must always pass the created document ID along with the call summary to your sub-agents. Do not launch Pricing until SOW is complete, so you can pass the SOW to the Pricing Agent for a consistent and aligned quote.

You must pass the created document ID to your sub-agents.
Output only the document ID when finished. Nothing else. No explanation.

Rejoins ma communauté Skool pour apprendre à réaliser des activités génératrice de revenu au quotidien dans un programme de 6 mois.

data.details:
The IF node can be used to implement binary conditional logic in your workflow. You can set up one-to-many conditions to evaluate each item of data being inputted into the node. That data will either evaluate to TRUE or FALSE and route out of the node accordingly.

This node has multiple types of conditions: Bool, String, Number, and Date & Time.

data.details: The Code node allows you to execute JavaScript in your workflow.

The Filter node can be used to filter items based on a condition. If the condition is met, the item will be passed on to the next node. If the condition is not met, the item will be omitted. Conditions can be combined together by AND(meet all conditions), or OR(meet at least one condition).
